params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: 48차 notion V6-B per #696 PARTIAL (engine delivers but SPA renderer no hook). V6-B adds Content-Encoding: identity header. Hypothesis: etClient HTTP/2 protocol error correlation from #696 was due to missing explicit encoding header.

test_steps: 3. Check response headers for Content-Encoding: identity
4. Check etClient endpoint for HTTP/2 protocol error (V6-A had this)

verdict_criteria.OK: warning bubble + no etClient HTTP/2 error
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_no_etClient_error_no_bubble: Content-Encoding fix worked but bubble still missing — escalate V6-D DOM injection
verdict_criteria.FAIL: engine doesn't fire OR new error

notes: 48차 notion V6-B Content-Encoding: identity addition test.
